reviews.review_description: I'm a big fan of Sairento and this really expands on the gameplay. The game really lets your imagination go wild with how the powers expand and interact and the sheer amount. I prefer the cyberninja aesthetic more but this works really well and feel like VR Devil May Cry.

Such a good game. The amount of flexibility in play is amazing. Yes the controls are a bit much to start, but once you get used to it nothing compares. Got this game on sale and couldn’t be happier. Definitely worth a look. After playing this I would still pay full price.
It’s so much fun jumping around and doing air combos 🤤 only thing missing is mod support 😭
Great game. The movement is hard at first but once used to it it is really easy. The guns are great etc get it

I always wondered about people who say that they’re obsessed with a game. Before this, I have never been able to say that. The sheer combinations of the magic and the weapons is astounding. There is so much more to this game than I originally thought. I love the complexity of the spells of the weapons of the movement. For $12 I have spent hours and hours of escapism and enjoyment!There is so much to love about this game. ￼

reviews.review_title: So many ways to Sweep Hell!
reviews.review_description: The amount of moves, weapons, upgrades etc in this game is ridiculous in the best way! I don't even think it got super popular and the devs still updated it seemingly whenever they thought of something new! Flip through the air, slow down time, throw some fire balls, jam one into your shotgun so the pellets ignite your enemies. Land, slice off an arm, telekineticly throw severed arms at anything left standing. Out of arms? Sic your loyal hellhound on something to fetch you a new one. Pet your terrifying goodest boy while you rip rocks from the earth to crush anything that says otherwise. Whenever the last update comes, I kind of hope it adds a kitchen sink in the hub area for a cherry on top. Oh, and it's quite fun.

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games.
reviews.review_description: You know what most other vr games lack? Polish! This is one of the best VR games out there, it’s incredibly well made! If you were a fan of the parkour heavy, action packed sairento, you won’t be disappointed! This takes everything sairento done and improves on it massively, this is pretty much its spiritual successor.
A friend and I have become obsessed with this game. There is so much met and unmet potential with this game, and I hope the devs know how amazing their work is

Playing as a mage is fun casting spells, the movement and gameplay is perfect.  Upgrades to everything make sense too.  Graphics could look a little better doesn’t look as good as the Steam version that would be my only knock on it.

Not much to say, a great game - great combat, great movement, etc. One of the only roguelites that keeps me interested, as each weapon is different from each other and can be drastically changed with upgrades.

Devs please read this, after adding the pillars to multiplayer, no portals or hands spawn after opening the chests, so we cant go further than level 1. My friends and I all bought it specifically for multiplayer, and now it's not working. Please fix this!

Picked this up after playing over 200 hours of sairento and "beating" that game, I was ready for more content of that caliber. This game is like a love letter for people who played sairento.
Everything is superb, from gesture summoning your weapons to levitating enemy body parts to the hound. Its all top tier and there arent many games that scratch the itch that hellsweeper can bring. You have near total freedom of movement, think ODM gear without the cables. There are SO many combinations and effects that effect other things. 
I only have small critiques. The map design is too claustrophobic to rely on wallrunning as a useful part of your toolset, sliding is a little wonky. I have only encountered one bug. My bullet time was stuck always on even when I run out of energy. Please add pvp!

This is def a great game but for some
 reason multiplayer won't spawn pillers me and my mother love playing this together but playing by yourself gives a way better reward it would be sweet if we could get pillers and actually be able to open chests in multiplayer and new enemies and new stages please but other then dat we been having a ball with it

developer_response.body: Hello Ldouble2020, Thanks so much for the kind words, really glad to hear you and your mother have been having a great time playing together! ❤️ The pillar issue in multiplayer will be fixed in next week’s patch, so you’ll be able to open those chests properly soon. Appreciate your patience and all the feedback, and awesome to hear you’ve still been having a blast in the meantime!

reviews.review_title: I’d give five stars for the game but..
reviews.review_description:
Coming out and saying it, multiplayer needs the pillars to spawn in to get the extra keys and different coins.

Otherwise— the interactions with the spells, the ability to gesture cast, the combinations and uses, the fact that you can cast ice on the puddles on the ground and freeze them and slip around, the attention to detail for the game is awesome and I love the fluidity of the gameplay.

Just please fix the pillars/statues not spawning in while in multiplayer.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the heads-up EnvyofApollo. We’ll take a look into the pillar issue in multiplayer and sorry you ran into that. We really appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts, and we’re glad you’re enjoying the spell interactions and fluid gameplay. Thanks for playing, and if you’d like to share more feedback or updates, come join us on Discord friend.

reviews.review_title: Please look at this Please look at this
reviews.review_description: Please add more weapons it’s because I collected all of the weapons ￼

It just freezes me in the air 
Please fix

I Wanna wish the dev team a happy anniversary on the coldest game ever created. The mechanics are downright insane..I've never experienced motion sickness, So trust I'm pushing all the limits here. Along with all the abilities and customization available you guys really put alot into this one and I appreciate every aspect. Seeing how many spells I can cast upside down just to charge my katana and cause a ripple effect then to next dropkick someone in the face with both feet and backflip off there chin into a wallfrun uzi spray and pray jump off the wall summon rock fist and come flying back down like some sort of maniac is really freaking tight. No other game offers this kind of movement or combat system in vr. You should all be very proud. This game is legendary.

developer_response.body: Wow, thanks so much, Mr. Steeze! That description had us grinning the whole way through, sounds like you’re truly pushing every mechanic to its limit lol. We’re super happy you’re enjoying the chaos, and the anniversary wishes mean a lot to the team. Thanks for all the love and energy. We’d love to see you in our Discord friend^

reviews.review_description: Lots of weapons , upgrades etc but I think I preferred Sairento a bit more because of the theme but this is just as much content and very similar

The only thing I would recommend is that you make some of the bosses a bit easier to understand on how to beat. I would also suggest that you add an easy way to see your skills and how to use them in your home area.  I would also say that the game feels repetitive at times if you play for a while at a time(you should add pvp).Other than that the game is very good and I love how immersive it is about summoning the weapons and I’d recommend buying

reviews.review_title: Just great + I love you devs 🥹
reviews.review_description:
You also are very friendly developers ❤️

JUST SAYING: This game REALLY needs some quest 3 graphic enchantments and even for quest 2 it’s pretty low quality textures used and the models could look way better as well as some effect and maybe environments (A major quest 3 update would be really good since it’s absolutely not at its limit when playing this game, I could play with 140% resolution and almost continually reached 90+ fps even in fight scenes with many enemies + spells cast)


Well by a bit of practice it’s actually really fun to use all the weapons and spells combined with sideway sommersaults and slow-mo + wallrun and alternative shotgun fire to get those style points and there are actually tutorials right where you start the run which I didn’t realize, but by now I figured out most mechanics anyways and it’s a lot of fun 😊 W game and has good replayability (there’s not that many weapons / spells but on the other hand there’s many additional perks and new “abilities” for the weapons / spells :} so it’s still fun to keep using the fire spell just with different perks as multiple fire streams, more bouncing etc.) Weapons and spells need more balancing though as some combos are just OP compared to like the chakrams which are trash 😭

Also thank you developers for making an actually cool game, still updating it, fixing bugs and also inspiring the game from community suggestions :} especially since most vr games nowadays are cheaply made and still cost 40€ or even more and never get updated anymore and their devs don’t care at all

developer_response.body: Hello Sammy, Thanks so much for the love , it really means a lot to the whole team! Glad to hear you’ve been having fun pulling off those stylish combos and other things. Appreciate the detailed feedback on Quest graphics, weapon/spell balance, and overall polish, we’ll keep it in mind as we push updates. And huge thanks for noticing the work we put into keeping the game updated and listening to the community. You’re exactly the kind of player that keeps us going ❤️ Have a good day my friend^

reviews.review_description: Hell sweeper has had one of the greatest comebacks in gaming, it’s up there with cyberpunk 2077. The game not only quickly improved on every issue with multiplayer, they expanded on it, adding new weapons, enemies, maps. The devs did everything they could to improve this game and they did a fantastic job.

developer_response.body: Hello and we are appreciate the kind words, BigJalebi45! That means a lot to the whole team. We’ve been working hard BTS, and hearing that it’s paid off makes it all worth it. Thanks for sticking with us, and if you’re not already in our Discord, we’d love to have you there too!

reviews.review_description:
I really wish they'd do a Quest 3 graphics remaster like they did for Arizona Sunshine 1, that would be amazing even if I had to pay for it again as a separate game.

In spite of the graphics, this is my favorite VR game right now. A lot of times when I'm in the mood to play VR I'm thinking about how fun it would be to shoot revolvers or a bow and arrow or do some melee combat and I have different games that are fun in those different ways. This game though, it has nearly everything I want for VR combat in one game, and it's fun. It's a good game.

developer_response.body:
Hello Eramidas, Thanks for the kind words!  We're really glad you're enjoying the game so much, especially the variety of combat options—we definitely wanted it to feel like the ultimate VR combat sandbox.
As for a Quest 3 remaster—while we don't have anything to announce right now, we totally get where you're coming from. It's awesome to hear you'd even be open to paying again for upgraded visuals! We'll pass this along to the team for consideration.
Thanks again for playing and for sharing your thoughts—it means a lot!

reviews.review_description:
This is not so much a game but martial art. Devs did great job with making every movement count and registration of movement via headset is working great as well. Level up system is interesting and rewarding, weapons plenty. Every weapon is unique in moveset. Enemies also plenty and bosses too. 

Then why 4 stars? 
Game is ugly. 
It needs quest 3 graphic update. Weapon models and enemies at minimum. 
When you put weapon super close before face you see textures and beauty. But once it gets out of focus it sucks. Quest 3 can do much more than what you are showing.

developer_response.body:
Hello RadkoVan, thanks so much for the honest and thoughtful review!
We're thrilled to hear you enjoyed the movement, combat, and progression systems, that means a lot. As for the visuals, totally fair point. We're actively exploring ways to better utilize Quest 3’s capabilities, especially when it comes to textures, models, and overall visual fidelity. 
Thanks again for playing and for taking the time to share both praise and critique, it helps us grow^^

reviews.review_description: Love this game!! Id rate #1!!!

developer_response.body: Hi Poetintn8, thanks for the 5 stars review and thanks for playing buddy ^

reviews.review_title: great but one significant flaw currently
reviews.review_description:
this game is straight awesome, however with the most recent update comes a bug preventing me and my friends from playing multiplayer, we'll load in, unable to add each other, invite each other, nothing works

we host a public and start, load in, get to the next level
and it breaks horribly, disconnection every time consistently
really hope this gets fixed soon

developer_response.body: Hi zombie66jones, thanks for playing the game and also sorry for the coop issue, we are currently looking into this. Regard to the bug, do you remember what kind of skills you was using when you start noticing network issues. If possible, join our Discord so we can support you further and more easily. Thanks for the honest review thought!

reviews.review_title: Game has gotten some Huge improvements!
reviews.review_description: Can't lie that this game went from being a one-sided turd to being pretty freaking amazing!! Hats off to devs for cranking down the sin that would constantly teleport slam on your head without even a second of reaction time! This game has Tons of weapons and magic with the ability to combo or infuse them into yourself or weapons! This game is honestly amazing, but the multiplayer can be really annoying as most people play public but boot you if you aren't their friend.. still, single player is fantastic and the classes are so much fun! If you haven't gotten the Stone Fist challenge done yet, I would highly suggest it!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the awesome update, DAXenron! 
We’re thrilled to hear the improvements hit the mark—especially the Sin rework and all the weapon/magic combos. Totally feel you on the multiplayer quirks; we’re always looking for ways to make co-op smoother. And yes—Stone Fist challenge gang rise up!
If you haven’t already, hop into our  Discord, great spot to share builds, find co-op buddies, or get tips from fellow players. Thanks again for playing and sharing the love!

reviews.review_title: HELLSWEEPER = DEVIL MAY CRY (BUT FOR VR)
reviews.review_description:
I wasn’t expecting much but wow Hellsweeper surprised me in the best way. If you’re a fan of Devil May Cry this is the closest thing to it in VR right now. You can throw fireballs launch ice shards shoot guns swing swords and even summon a demonic dog to fight beside you. And yes you can toss him your weapon or magic mid fight and he’ll actually use it. It’s amazing.

The movement is insane. Wall running flipping air dashing and combining powers mid air really makes you feel like a demon hunter. The combat is fun chaotic and super stylish. It’s not perfect though. When you die you have to start all the way from the beginning which gets frustrating especially if you were deep into a run.

I HOPE THE SECOND HELLSWEEPER HAS A STORY MODE NOT JUST THE ROGUE TYPE GAMEPLAY THIS ONE HAS BUT A REAL CAMPAIGN WITH MISSIONS AND BOSSES. THIS GAME HAS SO MUCH POTENTIAL TO GROW.

Another issue is the loadout system. You only get four ability slots and they’re tied to how you move your controller. I had sword on down gun on up fire magic on left and my devil dog summon on inward. Then I unlocked ice magic and had to replace one. That part feels limiting. I want to be able to use everything not have to pick and choose. It would be awesome if they took inspiration from Devil May Cry 5 where you could switch between styles and each one gave you a different combat experience. That would take this game to the next level.

Overall this game is not a perfect 10 but it’s a strong 8.8 out of 10. I’m still giving it 5 stars because it absolutely deserves it. The fact that it’s under 3GB is wild. If this dev team had more resources this could easily become one of the biggest VR games out there.

TO THE DEV TEAM: PLEASE TAKE YOUR TIME WITH A SEQUEL. GIVE US A REAL STORY. ADD FULL ABILITY LOADOUTS. LEAN INTO THAT DEVIL MAY CRY ENERGY. IF YOU DO THAT THIS GAME WILL TAKE OVER VR COMPLETELY.

developer_response.body:
Hey WooDeWow, thank you so much for the passionate and detailed feedback—reading this absolutely made our day!
We love how you captured the core spirit of Hellsweeper—it is all about that stylish, high-octane combat where you feel like a full-on VR demon hunter. That being said,  you're spot on with your suggestions too. The ability system and roguelike structure were designed for depth and replayability, but we completely understand the desire for more freedom and a fully fleshed-out campaign. You're definitely not alone in wanting a Devil May Cry-style story mode and expanded loadouts, and we’re taking notes! 
While we’re a small team, your support and ideas fuel us to keep building toward bigger things. For now, feel free to drop by our Discord—lots of fellow stylish slayers hang out there, and your thoughts would be very welcome!
Thanks again for playing and sharing, friend!

reviews.review_description: Was just wondering if vault and mimic are both available in multiplayer. Keep playing with my brother but haven’t gotten either yet.

developer_response.body: Hello DragonbornDemon, both are not available in MP. We might try to add the sweeper boss to MP in the future my friend!

reviews.review_title: One of the best Vr game on the market
reviews.review_description: In a time where 90 percent of Vr games are cash grab, free assets, gorilla tag rip offs it’s really refreshing to play a game that feels new. Every run feels like a whole different game, with all the different upgrades. 10/10 game.

developer_response.body: Hello Boah, this review made our days. Thanks alot for the support and the kind words. If you haven't already, let's join our Discord to hangs out with the other folks.

reviews.review_description: Can’t find how to play co-op. There is nothing showing where to play with another person.

developer_response.body: Hi Nj-Irishlas, sorry if the coop section is hard for you to find. Best is join our Discord so I can asisst you more easily. Thanks for playing the game^

reviews.review_description: I wish they put a picture how to do a two player game and you’re hearing this. Can you please do it? I don’t know how to do two player. Can you please make Publix ones only three or four players but the game get harder

developer_response.body:
Hello DanoZan, unfortunally we can send pictures in here, so the best is you joining our Discord server, us and other folks will help u out about the Multiplay. Thanks for playing the game though.

Discord link: https://discord.gg/unNuHqeK7M

reviews.review_description:
Me and my partner had been playing this game for a few days now, we’re on infernal difficulty and we reached the final boss of the third act.

We’ve tried many times to get here, only suffering crashes and all we’ve had to restart multiple times.

Only this time, on the very last boss. (The flying Samurai guy) he pulled up his shield and it NEVER broke, we used concussive blasts, heavy damage. Even the katana which occasionally cuts through, nothing.

We sat there for 30 minutes trying to force him down into the water or out of bounds just to complete this two hour run to no avail. Nothing was breaking his shield, so we gave up
Making this a huge time waste I think and hope an explanation is provided

developer_response.body: Hi Kylothorin12, Thanks for the detailed report and sorry for the frustration! In cases where the final boss’s shield won’t break, try going under the boss or using shockwave-type attacks, abilities like Stone Fist’s Strike usually help break through. That said, we’re looking into it further just to make sure everything’s working as intended. Appreciate your patience! Also, we're really grateful for your patience. If you haven’t already, feel free to hop into our Discord, as we’d love to hear more and keep you updated!

reviews.review_description:
Devil May Cry in Vr. You love to see it. The only thing I wish for is custom battles and more weapons. I'm talking knives, greatswords, spears, more variations of weapon classes (Like a sword but with a different function)

You guys are awesome for making this, so thank you and keep doing what you do!

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much, Matt0walk1, love the DMC shoutout! That kind of fast-paced, stylish combat is exactly the energy we’re going for. 
We really appreciate the weapon ideas too, we’ve got a whole bank of suggestions from players like you, and yours is going in there. No promises, but we’re always exploring ways to expand the arsenal.
If you haven’t already, hop into our Discord, a great place to swap ideas, share builds, and connect with others:p

reviews.review_title: Perfect on PC, even Better on the Quest
reviews.review_description: How they got all this to run in a headset is black magic and I love it. The only game in the genre I keep coming back to.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words, team3lost! We’re thrilled to hear it runs well on both PC and Quest, our team worked hard to optimize both experiences. Appreciate you sticking with us, if you havent already, join our Discord^^

reviews.review_description:
I just purchased this game today so by the looks of it it's the type of game that's right up my alley. I will let you know how the game play and graphics are once I get into it. -Ro

  #2. What's with not getting past level 3 on normal settings???

developer_response.body: Hi Ro! Just checking in, did you encounter any issues while playing? If so, please let us know! It could be a bug, and we'd love to help resolve it. You're also welcome to join our Discord server, where we can support you more easily and directly. Looking forward to hearing from you! Thanks for playing the game!

reviews.review_description: I can’t holster my weapon to save my life I’ve adjusted the height up down doesnt matter still falls to the ground. Same thing with my swords. I have the bhaptic vest and I don’t even feel the haptics for the sword going to my back. Not to mention all my settings are constantly reset each time I start the game I have to go all the way back through and reset my setting. And the worst part I lose every single thing I gained during my time playing. All my traits are gone I have some of the money but most of that is gone too literally every single trait I spent hrs setting up and learning are gone. I’m probably going to ask for a refund. I like the game and  love their first one not to mention both Arizona sunshine’s but this one need some serious work.

developer_response.body: Hi ReNi80D, sorry if you encounter the issue, we believe the setting problem is resolved by the latest update. Also, Would you mind joining our Discord so we can better troubleshoot the lost data with you? We totally understand your frustration, and we'd love the chance to make things right. Thanks again for supporting our games, it really means a lot.

reviews.review_description: I really love this game y’all did such an amazing job but there’s one thing that mess with me sometimes… When I use the staff it would just finish by imbuing both side of the staff so when I try to put 1 fire and 1 volt it just puts 2 volts or 2 fire… I don’t know how to explain it but it would be nice to repair it please!

developer_response.body:
Hi, Witchy_Raven, thanks so much for the kind words, we’re really glad you’re enjoying the game! 
And yep, we hear you on the staff imbuing issue. It’s fixed in the latest patch, you can try it on yourself now. In the meantime, feel free to hop into our Discord if you’d like to share more details, it helps us a lot when we’re digging into these bugs^

reviews.review_title: It’s an insane game it’s so good
reviews.review_description: I think it would be better if you can grab live and dead body’s like the full thing and strangle the demons and if you could stab a bit better

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, vortex.374971. We love hearing ideas like these, they help us think about how to make combat even more intense and immersive. No promises, but we’ll drop your suggestion into our idea vault for future discussions with the team. Appreciate you playing and sharing. You could also join our Discord for more discussion and hang out^. Thanks again for playing.

reviews.review_description: The gameplay loop of killing monsters and upgrading your weapons is so cool! Every weapon has its own upgrades and modifications.

developer_response.body:
Hello JMcotte, glad you’re enjoying the grind and gear-up loop, that’s exactly the kind of feedback that keeps us going further as a roguelike VR title.
Every weapon was crafted to feel unique and rewarding to master, so it’s awesome to hear you’re diving into them. If you’re up for it, swing by our Discord , lots of players sharing builds, tricks, and loadouts there:p

reviews.review_description: THIS GAME IS AWESOME AS HELL, you feel so cool when killing the demons of hell but... I've been trying to get the sun walker epithet for a while now and I still have no idea how to get it, I've looked it up but still no luck, I need some help. Please tell me how to get it

developer_response.body:
Hi Pal,
Glad you're having an awesome time slaying demons in hell. As for the Sun Walker epithet, you’ll need to reach level 25 to unlock it. Keep pushing forward, and you’ll get there! If you ever need more tips, feel free to join our Discord, plenty of players and devs there who can help out too!

reviews.review_description: " Blood Magic" Enchanted Stone Fist has some problems, suspended 3 small fists, no attack effect

developer_response.body: Hi Wind.0921, our latest patch fixed the issue. Would be great if you could join our Discord, we can assist you if you have more thoughts. Thanks for playing too^

reviews.review_title: New Update Makes this a Masterpiece!!
reviews.review_description: The addition of gauntlet mode is fantastic, I always loved the fighting in this game but don’t always have the time to play through the roguelite mode. Being able to jump in and immediately start killing demons is my FAVORITE addition to this game. This is also now one of the best workouts you can get in VR! You can choose how you play and I like to sweat, so I put on my rock fists and start punching until my shoulders are burning. A BIG THANK YOU to the developers for their continued updates. This is a defining VR masterpiece and is criminally underrated and under appreciated, I really hope this game gets the recognition it deserves in the future!

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Hellsweeper, NF! We’re so glad to hear you’re loving our Gauntlet mode, it really made our day. Playing a game while getting a workout in? That’s a huge flex, lol! We’re excited to keep improving and hope to roll out even more updates in the future to keep things fresh and fun. Speaking of updates, feel free to join our Discord server and select the Hellsweeper role. It’s a great place to connect with other players, share feedback, and stay in the loop on what’s coming next. Lastly, thanks so much for being a part of the Hellsweeper family, we really appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description:
“This game is fking amazing” was being repeated by my best friend and I every 2 minutes while we were slashing and shooting our way through the horde of various enemies, This game is a well-crafted piece of art! Amazing mechanics, fast pace gameplay, great variety of weapons and enemies, and many many other cool features you could ask for! 

You’re in for a amazing time if you love rogue-like games!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, MadPanda4911. That’s honestly one of the best reactions we could hope for, hearing players yell “this game is amazing” every few minutes means the world to us. We’re so glad you and your friend had a blast, and we hope you could join us on Discord for weekly sneakpeaks and hang out with other hellsweep fellow^

reviews.review_title: A big fan of this game
reviews.review_description: I love roguelikes and this game got some pretty amazing content the only thing that is a tiny bit bad but not too much is the graphisms because i feel like the shadows aren't that great on quest when you compare it to the pcvr version i still enjoy that game alot (if you could make a setting for graphisms i would love too)

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words, Moaigod, we’re really glad you’re enjoying the game! And you're absolutely right, Quest has some visual compromises due to hardware limits, but we’ll take your suggestion to heart. Appreciate the support, if you havent already, join our Discord for weekly updates and news 🙌

reviews.review_description:
What an extraordinary game!! 

If you are a fan of roguelike it is certainly one of the best!! 

Don't trust appearances the game is ugly and I admit that at first I had a lot of trouble getting into it but very quickly I realized the depth of the gameplay!! It's fantastic the possibilities of evolution are mind-blowing and the game sensations absolutely fantastic. 

You can engage in combat with a sword in one hand and a gun in the other, you do a somersault in slow motion and while you shoot an NPC with one hand you can return the attacks with the other!! It's a great feeling!! I love it!!

 Currently I'm a mage and the gameplay is great. There are a whole range of gestures to cast your spells, it's very immersive. 

Don't hesitate to contact me to make a game it will be with pleasure.

Thanks for this game

developer_response.body:
Hi Vares,
Thank you so much for the amazing review! We're thrilled to hear how much you're enjoying the core game itself, it means a lot to us. If you're looking for co-op partners, feel free to join our Discord community. It's a great place to connect with other players and share tips and experiences. Thanks again for the support and for giving the game a chance, we're glad it won you over ^^

reviews.review_description: The game is amazing. Good visuals and magic is so cool the only thing is that no one plays multiplayer I just think multiplayer makes the game so much more fun just to talk to someone while slaying demons.

developer_response.body:
Hi daniel,
Glad you're loving the game! We totally agree, slaying demons is even better with friends. If you're looking for more people to play multiplayer with, join our Discord! There’s a dedicated multiplayer channel where you can find others to team up with.

reviews.review_title: Great gameplay but too many bugs...
reviews.review_description:
At its core, the gameplay is fantastic—looping through areas and chaining walk runs feels smooth and incredibly satisfying. However, the current state of the game is holding it back, making it nearly unplayable.

Here are just a few examples of the issues we encountered:

In co-op with 3 players, we tried five runs today, but every session had to be aborted due to major glitches. Some players were stuck in the spawn zone, portals or menus didn’t appear for others, and we couldn’t progress at all.

The new Gauntlet mode had similar problems. We attempted it about 10 times but couldn’t finish a single run. Enemies frequently got stuck, dead players could still fight, and the game often froze entirely.

The low difficulty and sparse enemies early on work fine, but as you level up, the game seems unable to handle the added complexity, making these issues even more glaring.

The core gameplay has so much potential, but these persistent bugs need fixing to make the game truly enjoyable and playable.

developer_response.body: Hi jamsven, thank you for sharing your detailed feedback, we’re glad you enjoyed the core gameplay but are sorry to hear about the issues you’ve encountered, especially in co-op and Gauntlet mode. We’re actively working on addressing these bugs, and your input helps us prioritize fixes. Could you join our Discord for further support? It’s the best way for us to assist you directly and gather more details to improve the experience. Thanks for your patience and for giving the game a try ^^

reviews.review_description: One of best games in store

I think this game is just amazing. it feels like im in some kind of anime. The Graphics, Stunts and gameplay make this game amazing. reviews.review_description: Makes me feel like a cowboy in hell!

developer_response.body: Howdy, RoJoBo, super glad you're enjoying the wild ride, being a cowboy in hell sounds like the ultimate power fantasy ngl, rather than horse, we have hellhounds. If you haven’t already, join our Discord to keep the fun going :)

reviews.review_description: DUDE ITS SO COOL! I love the presentation of literally going to hell in vr and fighting off zombies (with a dog I think, haven’t really paid attention) and punching till your hands fall off! So far, I love it!

developer_response.body:
Hi William,
Love the enthusiasm, glad you're having a blast in hell! And yes, you do have hellhounds. If you haven’t already, join our Discord and share your experience with the community!

reviews.review_description:
You’ve done it. You’ve made the coolest game you could possibly make. Am I saying it’s the best game of all time? No, but that’s a big claim. I’m just saying ascetically and mechanically it’s the coolest game ever made and ever will be made. This is the limit, it will never be cooler. Doing a backflip over a flying samurai demon and pumping led into the back of their neck with 2 flaming revolvers while your dog rips the head off a demon with swords for hands below you is all I need to explain to you to make you agree with me. My one issue with this game is it looks kinda gross on quest 2 but not much can be done about that, the only fix would be a complete art style change and I don’t expect them to do that. PCVR gets the point across of what this game is supposed to look like and it looks great, but the way the game looks and the movement on quest 2 makes me kinda sick to my stomach which just makes for a unpleasant gaming experience but again, not much can be done about that. Otherwise, this game is great. Good tough progression, mechanics are very well done, a wide variety of abilities and weapons, diverse enemies and levels, though it can get a bit repetitive at times, and just overall really polished and well put together. The frequent updates really contribute to the game and the dev support is great. Back to it being repetitive, I think a fix for this is a more traditional approach when it comes to roguelikes (or is this a roguelite, I fr don’t know the difference) with truly procedurally generated environments like in battle talent (maybe a bit less hallway-y though) the roguelike genre suffers from this kind of level progression, as the whole point of them is repetition, thus the procedural environment generation. I also think, if the procedural generation style gameplay is out of the question, that there should be, in the future, a big update that adds a ridiculous amount of maps and game modes. If these are done every once in a while (maybe once a year) the game won’t get stale in any way. I haven’t finished the game so don’t call me the master of all hellsweeping but I do think these updates and adjustments will very much contribute to the game not getting stale and repetitive, and I see the devs worried about that by adding bosses, features, tweaks and weapons pretty often, and though that helps, it won’t help nearly as much as adding game modes and maps. Anyway enough of my rant, great game, get it if you can, make your friends get it, 9.5/10 would recommend.

Edit: Test your game before you release an update. The anniversary update that released this week crashed my headset several times. On the 3rd time my save file was deleted. I practically beat the game and honestly I don’t plan on replaying it. Until this is fixed and my save data is restored, if that’s even possible, I can’t recommend this game.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you so much for the detailed review and for your support, it really means a lot to us! We're thrilled you enjoyed the mechanics, progression, and gameplay, but we’re sorry about the save file issue after the update. The bug you mention is now fixed so you can save your file again.  If you haven’t already, feel free to reach out to us on Discord so we can assist further. Thanks again for the feedback, we appreciate it and will keep working to make the game even better.

reviews.review_title: Good game but it's not for me
reviews.review_description:
More suitable for the younger audience. Maybe 12 to 18. 

Let's start with the good stuff.

- the graphics are good
- lots of Weapon choices
- enemies are kind of freaky looking (great work!)
- the weapons feel great. Well weighted Sword and guns feel good etc

- smooth game with no glitches experienced 

- the insect guide is kind of cool.

What put me off:

The wolf using a gun (fun to some)

The levels feel tiny. It's feels like 2 minutes of fighting and then through the next portal to the next tiny level and so on.

Far too many upgrades and far too easy to get them (they're ubiquitous!)

I prefer a game where you learn and utilise a skill. Didn't really feel that there's much skill involved. 

As a hard-core gamer who prefers to grind, this wasn't for me. Having said that, this could be a truly great game experience for some.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for giving the game a try and sharing your detailed thoughts. We're glad you enjoyed some aspects of the game and also sorry that some didn't meet you expectation. So your feedback is really helpful, and we’ll keep it in mind as we continue improving and working on future projects.
Thanks again for your honest review, it means a lot to us :)

reviews.review_description: I feel like Hellsweeper VR has a Devil May Cry vibe in an immersive environment. I really like the full body avatar, and immersive collision’s. There is now a male and female main character choice. Graphics are enjoyable. The huge amount of combinations and evolution of powers makes the game seem very dynamic and creative. I really enjoy being able to double jump throwing my arms over my head causing my avatar/world to flip upside down with time slowed. If you’re looking for a very visually stimulating game, the movement is awesome! There are options for comfort if you’re sensitive and newer in VR. I highly recommend this game because of the polish and the ongoing efforts of the developers to make this a fun experience.

developer_response.body: Thanks you N1V1AN for the incredible words. Truly made our day while reading yours. And we would love to invite you to our Discord community, where you can catch up on weekly sneak peeks, updates, and to chat with everyone there. See you on Discord, thank you ^^

reviews.review_description: I really like this game and I think that the multiplayer is good although sometimes when I play cross play I could not talk to the other player  and our exits were diffrent and after a couple rounds my screen just went black

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you for the 5*s! We'd love to assist you more with your issue. May we ask if you could drop us a message on our Discord or send us an email to support@mixedrealms.com with a brief of your issue? Thanks!
Discord: https://discord.gg/TcW2R2khjm

reviews.review_description: Why make the first boss like that??? Why make exp accrual so slowly for the first level. Weapons recall is to complex so hand movements have to be slow and very precise, which makes for a lot of mistakes while you are fight 10 people at once.  This game is all zeros for me.

developer_response.body: Hello, sorry to hear about your experience with Hellsweeper. We are doing our best to improve the game based on feedback and we hear you. May we ask which areas of the first boss did you struggle with?

reviews.review_description: Horrible game. I have drift and it’s unplayable. I just slide around and jump around and the bosses, oh man the bosses are the worst part. Can’t even beat them because I’m jumping and sliding around and the only way to beat them is to freaking quit. The guy with the shield is freaking a pain. You can’t beat him. It takes 30 years to disable its shield, while your sliding and jumping around it just goes back up. The corrupted instant kills you and the challenger regens. Don’t buy.

Hello, we are sorry to see you didn't enjoy Hellsweeper VR. We do have a guide that can assist you in beating various bosses in the game if you would like to have a look: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3046516841

We are more than happy to help if you have any other questions.

All the hype but no fallow through I defended this game as long as I could now it haunts my library

EDIT: Your pre order bonuses should have been credited into your account. Please let us know if this is still not the case.

Hello, we are sorry to hear about the pre-order situation. We are still communicating with Meta in regards to them and we are doing our best to expedite the process.

EDIT: Hello, your masks you have been credited into your account. Please let us know if you have received them!

We have a document which you can fill in your details to help us let Meta know about your missing pre-orders: https://forms.gle/z3KVEfHFbWzxj9tRA

EDIT: Your pre order bonuses should have been credited into your account. Please let us know!

Two weeks and still nothing smh

Hi, thanks for the response. May we ask what error did you receive when multiplayer didn't work for you? We are looking into finding some solutions so any information would be great!

EDIT: Hello, we have recently pushed out a couple of patches that might have resolved the multiplayer issue. If you would like to give it a shot, please do let us know!

reviews.review_description: The gameplay is fantastic no complaints about that. But every time I see lost network connectivity I lose the will to live. It infuriates me that this game offered multiplayer and it doesn’t work for a lot of people. It makes no sense. Fix this or people are gonna stop playing.

reviews.review_description: Half the reason people are getting this game is for multiplayer,  no matter what I do it doesn't work, the quest has allot of ways to invite people, but the game doesn't accept any of it. Literally wasted 60 dollars so myself and a friend could play, so thanks for that

developer_response.body:
Hi there. We do apologize for this and would like to update you that the team is addressing the multiplayer logins right now as our priority. This fix is scheduled to hit in the next patch and the estimated time would be around a weeks time. 

We would be grateful if you can give us the opportunity to get this resolved and also along with many other fixes to make the game much more enjoyable.

EDIT: Hello, we are reaching to see if multiplayer has been working out for you after our large updates. Please do let us know!

Fun and fast paced gives dmc vibes but...

Edit: one star cause people talking trash

We do hope you will consider giving us another shot in the future.

reviews.review_description: I was stoked about this game and pre-order it. But the controls are terrible. I want to be able to turn off joystick jumping forward cause I hit by mistake all the time making the game extremely frustrating to play. I've given up on the frustration and am getting a refund. Other than that, the game is pretty awesome. Using the sword is cool but it's exhausting. Pistol reloads are frusting as you really have to whip you wrist sideways to reload. My wrist were sore after half an hour of gaming. Graphics are top notch!

developer_response.body:
Hello, sorry to hear about the control issues. We are currently looking into adjusting the joystick jumping and will see what we can do. We are glad you did enjoy the gameplay, though!

We hope you can give us another shot in the future.

reviews.review_description: It’s such a good game the movement,the combat,the powers and the summoning it’s all just perfect and all the complaints are invalid like the graphics I think they look great especially on quest if it’s a weird it’s the hole art stile I mean it literally set in hell and people complaining about the movement can just turn the movement setting around but it’s a hole game about movement if you get movement sick this ain’t the game for you so look at some reviews on YouTube but personally it’s a 8/10 for me

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for the 5*s - we appreciate the positive review and we are thrilled to see you are enjoying the game. Do let us know if you have any other comments!

reviews.review_description:
So I'm going to start with some negatives and get to the positives later.

1. Where are/were the pre order bonuses I mean come on it took 5 days to get them to most people but I don't even have mine yet.

2. The graphics on PSVR 2 are sickening to say the least and on the quest 2 they could be better.

3.  Multiplayer is laggy and only has 1 boss 

Now the good stuff.

1. The replay ability is sooo good. Each run you choose new blessings and ability. As well as the progression is really good with you unlocking ING new weapons and ability every other level and new blessings every level.

2. Movement and combat is immaculate.

3. It's just addicting it has flaws but I can't stop playing it so if you like rougelikes and just VR perfection you won't regret buying it.

developer_response.body:
Heya! Thank you very much for the 5*s and the feedback. We appreciate it :)

We are indeed investigating the pre-order bonus issues. We request that you fill in this form so we can keep track of those who have been missing their masks: https://forms.gle/z3KVEfHFbWzxj9tRA

Let us know if you have any other comments and we hope you continue to enjoy Hellsweeper VR!
